items.problem: (runHome) No integration test exercises the `atcr --axi` bare invocation path; the AXI home view is only unit-tested at the renderer level, not end-to-end (AC4)

(TestRootCmd_BareInvocationShowsHomeView) AC5 requires a golden/snapshot test pinning the non-`--axi` home-view output, but no such test exists; the existing test only checks substrings, not the exact output

(TestRootCmd_BareInvocationShowsHomeView) TestRootCmd_BareInvocationShowsHomeView is not isolated from the filesystem; its output depends on whether `.atcr/latest` exists in the working directory, making it unreliable
relHome has no direct tests for edge cases (path under home, path outside home, home dir error); the integration test relies on the real home directory, making relativization nondeterministic

positions.problem: relHome has no direct tests for edge cases (path under home, path outside home, home dir error); the integration test relies on the real home directory, making relativization nondeterministic

items.problem: relHome constructs paths using filepath.Separator, which produces backslashes on Windows, potentially breaking downstream TOON parsers or scripts that expect forward slashes in the exec_path field

positions.problem: relHome constructs paths using filepath.Separator, which produces backslashes on Windows, potentially breaking downstream TOON parsers or scripts that expect forward slashes in the exec_path field

items.problem: resolveHomeState error paths (anchorDir non-ErrNotExist, ReadReviewStatus failure) have zero test coverage; the "unavailable" degrade is never exercised

positions.problem: resolveHomeState error paths (anchorDir non-ErrNotExist, ReadReviewStatus failure) have zero test coverage; the "unavailable" degrade is never exercised

items.problem: runHome uses a hardcoded fallback "atcr" for the executable path

positions.problem: runHome uses a hardcoded fallback "atcr" for the executable path

items.problem: Golden test hardcodes Unix forward-slash paths but relHome uses platform filepath.Separator — golden passes while real code path produces backslash paths on Windows

positions.problem: Golden test hardcodes Unix forward-slash paths but relHome uses platform filepath.Separator — golden passes while real code path produces backslash paths on Windows

items.problem: relHome uses a bespoke string concatenation for the home separator
